app.name: Reflex
app.one_liner: A full-stack web framework for building performant, customizable web applications entirely in Python without JavaScript.

screens.name: Main App Screen
screens.purpose: Display the primary user interface of the Reflex-built web application, rendered from Python-defined components and state.
primary_actions: Interact with UI elements bound to Python state
Trigger backend logic via event handlers written in Python

rust_commands.name: save_item
rust_commands.purpose: Persist application state or user data to storage (simulated command representing Reflex's backend persistence capability).

mvp_plan: week 1: Define core UI components and state in Python
week 1: Deploy app using single-command hosting option
week 1: Initialize Reflex project using recommended uv environment
acceptance_tests: Application deploys successfully with one command to a live URL.
User can create a new Reflex app and run it locally without writing any JavaScript.
